compiled_state.title: Fix key name mismatches and audit design.tokens_path in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Correct key name mismatches in onboarding SKILL.md and audit design.tokens_path.

### Changes
1. Rename jira.project_key → jira.project in SKILL.md (config table and Jira section)
2. Rename design.system → design.system_name in SKILL.md (config table)
3. Audit design.tokens_path: check if it exists in validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS. If not, either add it to KNOWN_KEYS or remove from SKILL.md config table
4. Verify with codebase-wide grep that no files reference old key names

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh (possibly modify for design.tokens_path)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] No references to jira.project_key in repo
  Verify: ! grep -r "jira.project_key" plugins/ tests/ --include="*.sh" --include="*.md" --include="*.py" | grep -v ".tickets-tracker"
- [ ] No references to design.system without _name suffix
  Verify: ! grep -rP "design\.system[^_]" plugins/ tests/ --include="*.sh" --include="*.md" --include="*.py" | grep -v ".tickets-tracker"

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (pre-existing RED tests confirmed failing) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
